name: Centennial Funding
description_short: Centennial Funding is a credit repair provider based in Denver, Colorado. Rated 4.3/5 on Google.
description_long:
Centennial Funding is a credit repair provider serving clients in Denver, Colorado. The company serves consumers in the Denver area who are looking to repair and improve their credit scores.

Operating as a loan agency, Centennial Funding provides a range of services for consumers seeking credit repair solutions. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in Denver, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. Centennial Funding operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the Denver, Colorado area who are considering Centennial Funding should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
